title: Better Pixelmon Flying
description: A datapack that adds back infinite flight to Pixelmon 9.1.2+
body:
_This datapack adds back infinite flying into Pixelmon 9.1.2+, by removing the stamina charge limit._ To install, just put the zip file in the "datapack" folder of your world, installing it on a server applies the changes globally on every player's client without any action needed on their side. ### Feel free to use this datapack in any modpack, crediting is not required, but appreciated! #

Download Better Flying for 1.16.5

Download Better Flying for 1.20.2

#

with Better Flying on the left, normal Pixelmon on the right

![Datapack visualisation](https://i.imgur.com/AEit2XO.gif) # **Warning**: _This datapack will probably break if you're using other pokemon-editing datapacks that edit flying pokemon._
